steps.t: Crannog and Soltakh can be found at the outskirts of Aughaire in Angmar. After the parley at Fail-á-Khro, Crannog and the Trév Gállorg have returned t…
Soltakh can be found on the outskirts of Aughaire in Angmar. After the parley at Fail-á-Khro, Crannog and the Trév Gállorg have returned to Aughaire. …
Crannog can be found on the outskirts of Aughaire in Angmar. After the parley at Fail-á-Khro, Crannog and the Trév Gállorg have returned to Aughaire. …
